headline: 3 Software Stocks Citi Just Downgraded as Slump Refuses to Let Up
summary: As first-quarter earnings loom “amidst parabolic AI revenue inflections at foundational model leaders,”  Citi  Research analysts expect the concerns around the durability of business models for software-as-a-service companies to intensify in the months ahead.  The rating readjustment reflects Citi’s house view on software.  From their perspective, “investors will struggle to get comfortable with the sector at large” until they see more meaningful growth acceleration, more clarity on focus areas of developers like OpenAI and Anthropic as they creep into the enterprise software market.

raw.headline: 3 Software Stocks Citi Just Downgraded as Slump Refuses to Let Up

The rating readjustment reflects Citi’s house view on software.  From their perspective, “investors will struggle to get comfortable with the sector at large” until they see more meaningful growth acceleration, more clarity on focus areas of developers like OpenAI and Anthropic as they creep into the enterprise software market.

headline: $15 Billion Changes the Conversation: Amazon's AI Disclosure, a Software Sector Under Siege, and Markets Hanging on Friday's Inflation Print
summary: Two days in a row of green closes and yet Thursday's session felt nothing like celebration. The Dow Jones and the Nasdaq extended Wednesday's relief rally, but the gains were narrow, the mood was cautious, and half the market was quietly bleeding.
